message:
feat(engine): add number hostcalls, fix float-aware stdlib, and add temporary scope budget tracking

Number hostcall dispatch (baseline_interpreter.rs):
- Add dispatch_number_hostcall() for isNaN, isFinite, Number.isNaN,
  Number.isFinite hostcalls routing to stdlib implementations
- Add temporary memory budget tracking via clone_scope_frames_with_temporary_budget
  and snapshot_scope_chain_with_temporary_budget to avoid double-counting
  heap allocations when swapping closure scope chains
- Update ~12 existing float arithmetic tests to use quickjs_test_core() helper

Stdlib float corrections (stdlib.rs):
- Rewrite isNaN/isFinite globals to correctly handle JsValue::Float values
  instead of only integer-based shims
- Add exec_number_static() for Number.isNaN, Number.isFinite,
  Number.isInteger, Number.isSafeInteger static methods
- Fix global NaN and Infinity constants to use real f64 values
  (f64::NAN, f64::INFINITY) instead of integer placeholder shims
- Add Float handling to JSON.stringify and coerce_to_string

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
